things.name: Guggenheim Museum Bilbao
things.description: Frank Gehry's titanium-clad masterpiece that transformed the city and modern architecture

things.name: Casco Viejo (Old Town)
things.description: Charming medieval quarter of seven streets with pintxos bars and local character

things.name: San Mames Stadium
things.description: Magnificent home of Athletic Club Bilbao with stadium tours and football museum

things.name: Euskalduna Conference Centre
things.description: Striking ship-shaped concert hall on the Nervion river

things.name: Fine Arts Museum Bilbao
things.description: Spain's second most important art museum with El Greco, Goya and Basque masters

things.name: Artxanda Funicular
things.description: Funicular railway to the Artxanda hill with sweeping views over the city

things.name: Azkuna Zentroa
things.description: Former wine warehouse transformed into a spectacular cultural and leisure centre

things.name: Ribera Market
things.description: Europe's largest covered market with the best pintxos and Basque produce

things.name: Nervion River Walk
things.description: Regenerated riverside promenade from Deusto to Abandoibarra

things.name: San Juan de Gaztelugatxe
things.description: Dramatic hermitage on a rocky islet connected by a winding stone staircase
